name: Subtitle OCR
description: Converts embedded image-based subtitle tracks (VobSub/DVD and PGS/Blu-ray) to external SRT files using nOCR pattern matching. Pure managed code: no Tesseract and no native dependencies. The .nocr database format is interchange-compatible with Subtitle Edit, so databases trained or corrected in its GUI drop straight in. A scheduled task scans your Movie and Episode libraries and writes an SRT beside each image-based track.
overview: OCR image-based DVD and Blu-ray subtitles to SRT.

versions.changelog: 10.11.0.1 - Initial release. OCRs embedded image-based subtitles (VobSub/DVD and PGS/Blu-ray) to SRT files using nOCR pattern matching, with Subtitle Edit-compatible .nocr databases. Pure managed code: no native dependencies.
